mapper.sql: select address_id, user_id, recipient, phone, province_code, city_code, district_code, detail_address, is_default, del_flag, create_time, update_time from shop_user_address
mapper.select: select user_id from shop_user where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' and del_flag = '0' for update
where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' order by is_default desc, address_id desc
where user_id = #{userId} and address_id = #{addressId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select count(1) from shop_user_address where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into shop_user_address (user_id, recipient, phone, province_code, city_code, district_code, detail_address, is_default, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{recipient}, #{phone}, #{provinceCode}, #{cityCode}, #{districtCode}, #{detail}, #{isDefault}, '0', sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_user_address set recipient = #{recipient}, phone = #{phone}, province_code = #{provinceCode}, city_code = #{cityCode}, district_code = #{districtCode}, detail_address = #{detail}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and address_id = #{addressId} and del_flag = '0'
update shop_user_address set is_default = 0, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and is_default = 1 and del_flag = '0'
update shop_user_address set is_default = 1, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and address_id = #{addressId} and del_flag = '0'
update shop_user_address set is_default = 0, del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and address_id = #{addressId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select address_id from shop_user_address where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' order by address_id desc limit 1
